title: 이세계 인력 사무소
description:
"Isekai reincarnation? Yeah, we’re the ones who arrange all that." 

Countless modern-day people dream of escaping reality by heading to another world. 

But demand is high, and supply is limited. Not just anyone can become an isekai hero.

Starting today, you are an evaluator at the "Re:born Isekai Company". 

Your job is to screen usable souls and dispatch them to the appropriate worlds. 

What happens if you send a pacifist to a brutal post-apocalyptic world? ...Well, they'll figure it out. As long as your performance metrics go up, that's all that matters.

Key Features• Document Screening: Deciding the Fate of Souls

 

Every single trace of a soul's past life is laid bare in various documents. 

Don't be fooled by appearances. It's up to your keen eye to figure out whether these scraps of paper hold the makings of a legendary hero—or just Villager NPC #1.

• Interrogations to Fill in the Blanks 

 

Documents alone won't reveal a soul's true nature. Ask them direct questions and observe their reactions. 

The moment they answer, you'll know exactly which world they belong in.

• Stories of Unique and Quirky Souls

 

From a Office worker who died of overwork during overtime to an otaku who spent their whole life dreaming of reincarnation. A long line of souls with tragic, dramatic backstories awaits. 

Of course, just because a story is sad doesn't mean you're obligated to send them somewhere nice. We're not a charity, after all.

• The Butterfly Effect of Your Choices

 

Did you send a soul with zero stamina to a high-fantasy world? Too bad. They became goblin food within five minutes of reincarnating. 

Birth a legendary hero's epic tale, or bring about the complete doom of a world. Everything depends on your choices.
description_short: "Isekai reincarnation? It's all in your hands." Review countless souls at Re:Born Isekai Company and assign them to new worlds. In this text-based inspection sim, a single paperwork flaw or question can birth a legendary hero—or unleash a catastrophic disaster.
